title: Limbo
tagline: Pick a target multiplier; win it if the roll flies high enough.
mechanic: A heavy-tailed result R is drawn with P(R ≥ x) = RTP/x. You win your chosen target T whenever R ≥ T. EV is RTP for every target, so the house edge never depends on how greedy you are.
showcases: SimpleMath play() — open and settle in one call
host.mark.* annotations feeding the simulator's deviation report
mathTest: RTP is provably independent of the target — the simulator measures 0.99 with the default target, and --compare across targets stays flat.
